title: Popular UFO expert dead at 60: ‘He challenged us to look beyond’
description: Nick Pope revealed that he had been diagnosed with Stage 4 esophageal cancer that had spread to his liver.

title: Popular UFO expert dead at 60: ‘He challenged us to look beyond’
description: UFO expert Nick Pope, best known for his appearances on the History Channel’s “Ancient Aliens,” has died. He was 60 years old. “My heart is breaking — Nick passed away this afternoon at our home,” his wife Elizabeth posted to...

title: UFO Expert Nick Pope Dies at 60
description: Nick Pope, long-time contributor to the History Channel’s Ancient Aliens and former U.K. Ministry of Defence official, has died at 60 after a battle with cancer. Through his well-known work on UFOs and extraterrestrial phenomena, Pope became known as the real-life Fox Mulder, the main character in The X-Files. Pope was survived by his wife, Elizabeth Weiss, [...] The post UFO Expert Nick Pope Dies at 60 appeared first on VICE .

title: Mystery deaths of boffins linked to UFO secrets as ninth scientist joins grim list
description: Numerous top NASA scientists with ties to UFO secrets and missile technology have either died, been murdered or gone missing in suspicious circumstances over the last several years
